data_source: Historical accumulated (352 resolved trades) + insight_journal_2026-05-08 + meta_learning cross-validation
note: No new trades (bot offline 578.2h). HYPE_UNKNOWN_REGIME added from cross-source validation (live_edge_data + meta_learning). EVENING_SESSION confirmed from meta_learning (65% WR, n=27) — rule already gated at 80% (EVENING_session_boost). MORNING_WINDOW opens in T-4.85h (06:00 UTC May 18).

high_edges.note: ETH_SELL_BB = 70% WR, trending-ETH avg +$9.49. Tier-1 BB golden setup (BB_solo = 67.6% WR). Awaiting live data for graduation.
BTC_BUY_BB = 69% WR. Second-best BB setup. SOL_BUY_BB = 67% WR (third). BB solo overall 67.6% WR vs ensemble 51.9%.
BB firing ALONE (without MTQ agreement) = 67.6% WR. BB+MTQ co-agreement = 35% WR (anti-pattern). Solo BB is +EV; consensus with MTQ is -EV.

BTC SHORT at 90%+ confidence = 67% WR, +$102.92/trade EV (43 trades). CONTRADICTS general BTC_SHORT negative EV (-$7.22 avg). The existing btc_short_conf70_80_penalize rule is correct: 70-80% is the problem bin. 90%+ is the profit bin.
ETH in TRENDING regime: 71% WR, +9.49/trade. Regime x symbol interaction insight (conf=0.85). Strongest cross-regime edge found.
BTC in TRENDING regime: 80% WR, +8.98/trade (n=5, barely qualifies). Strongest regime-filtered edge on record.
HYPE in UNKNOWN regime: 83% WR, +6.56/trade (n=6). Side-agnostic. Probe rule applied. Investigate if LONG or SHORT drives edge on restart.

CONFLICT: Insight journal (conf=0.83) shows 60-70% confidence = +2.19/trade EV (42% WR, 67 trades). BUT conf_floor_70_v1 runtime rule penalizes -20pts based on 123 trades at -$2321 total. Conflicting sample sizes/windows. conf_floor_70_v1 may be blocking +EV signals.

weak_setups.note: Confidence 70-80% is the WORST band: 33% WR, -4.05/trade. -174 total. Counterintuitive: high confidence underperforms lower confidence.

new_insights_this_run.HYPE_UNKNOWN_REGIME: NEW_UNDISCOVERED: 83% WR, +6.56/trade — not in any prior state
new_insights_this_run.CONF_60_70_CONFLICT: CRITICAL: insight shows +EV but conf_floor_70_v1 penalizes -20pts

top_edge: ETH_SHORT+trending+morning = ~80%+ WR (5 live trades + 70% historical pattern)
top_killer: SOL_LONG: 24% WR on 34 trades, -$21.89. HYPE_LONG: 23% WR on 35 trades, -$77.26
new_block: BTC_SHORT at 70-79% confidence (orphan rule finding: worst loss bucket)

injection_prompt_update.regime_filter: Only trade in TRENDING regime unless conf > 85%
injection_prompt_update.new_block_conf_range: BTC_SHORT at 70-79% confidence — avoid or reduce to 50% size
injection_prompt_update.early_close_priority: Exit agent should proactively close before SL in 93% of cases
injection_prompt_update.new_conf_filter: conf_floor_70_v1 active in runtime: 60-70% conf signals penalized -20pts. Effective minimum bar is now ~70%+ for any signal to pass.
injection_prompt_update.bb_pattern_alert: BB solo signals (no MTQ) = 67.6% WR — BOOST. BB+MTQ agreement = 35% WR — ANTI-PATTERN, penalize -10pts or skip.
injection_prompt_update.bb_golden_setups: ETH_SHORT+BB = 70% WR, BTC_BUY+BB = 69% WR, SOL_BUY+BB = 67% WR (all tier-1 golden setups awaiting live confirmation)

new_anti_patterns.BB_MTQ_combo: BB+MTQ co-agreement = 35% WR (92% conf, pending live confirmation). Treat as contra-indicator.
new_anti_patterns.HYPE_SELL_BB: HYPE_SELL+BB = 35% WR (92% conf). Worst BB setup — block or -15pt penalty.

backtest_vs_live_gap.warning: SIGNIFICANT OVERFITTING DETECTED in trades_10d.csv backtest
backtest_vs_live_gap.implication: Trust live data over backtest for long/direction rules. SOL_SHORT and HYPE_SHORT are consistent between backtest and live.

priority_restart_edges.action_on_restart: Allow BTC_SHORT signals at 90%+ confidence to bypass btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1 rule. The existing rule penalizes 70-80% bin which is correct. 90%+ bin should be explicitly whitelisted.

projected_ev_on_restart.note: Based on historical WR. Requires live validation.

new_finding_this_run.detail: conf_floor_70_v1 (LLM layer, penalizes -20pts for 60-70% confidence signals) has been applied 2 times with times_correct=0. Without outcome callbacks, we cannot determine if this rule is helping or hurting. Risk: the insight_journal (conf=0.83, 67 trades) shows 60-70% signals = +$2.19/trade EV with 42% WR (asymmetric payoff). If conf_floor_70_v1 is blocking these, it is costing alpha. This is only resolvable after outcome callback fix.
new_finding_this_run.dependency: Fix outcome_feedback_callback FIRST, then re-evaluate conf_floor_70_v1 after 20+ trade outcomes.

morning_window_note: T-4.85h until 06:00 UTC morning window (71-80% WR, +8pt boost active for ETH+trend and BTC+trend)
